hero.subtitle: International platform for dialogue, partnerships and exchange of practices in Islamic finance and business.

about.title: About the Forum
about.body1: Islamic Finance and Business Forum 2026 is an international forum bringing together experts, business representatives, financial institutions, regulators, investors and the professional community to discuss current issues in Islamic finance and business.
about.body2: The Forum creates a space for substantive dialogue, sharing practical experience, establishing new partnerships and discussing key challenges and opportunities in the industry.

items.title: Financial Institutions
items.description: Banks, Islamic financial organizations, investment and consulting structures.

items.title: Business
items.description: Companies and entrepreneurs interested in partnerships, growth and new instruments.

items.title: Regulators and Development Institutions
items.description: Representatives of government, quasi-government and industry structures.

items.title: Experts and Academic Communities
items.description: Researchers, educators, analysts and specialists in relevant fields.

items.title: Investors
items.description: Representatives of the investment community and structures working in adjacent areas.

items.title: Professional Communities
items.description: All those working at the intersection of finance, business, Islamic economics and sustainable development.

items.title: Relevant Expertise
items.description: A practical perspective on trends, challenges and opportunities in Islamic finance and business.

items.title: Strong Speakers
items.description: Access to insights from industry leaders, regulators, international experts and practitioners.

items.title: New Partnerships
items.description: The opportunity to establish business connections and discuss joint initiatives.

items.title: Regional and International Dialogue
items.description: Discussion of issues relevant to Kazakhstan, Central Asia and the international market.

items.title: Practical Value
items.description: Cases, solutions and ideas that can be applied in professional practice.

items.title: Visibility for Business and Institutions
items.description: A platform for positioning, partnership and professional presence in the industry.

programs.title: Forum Program
programs.subtitle: The program of Islamic Finance and Business Forum 2026 includes plenary sessions, thematic panels, expert presentations, practical discussions and professional networking opportunities.
